exchanges.prompt: Design an AWS serverless API with API Gateway, Lambda, DynamoDB, S3, and CloudWatch monitoring

response.content:
graph TD
    subgraph Public Zone
        API_Gateway[API Gateway] -->|REST| Lambda_Function(Lambda Function)
    end
    subgraph AWS Services
        Lambda_Function -->|Trigger| DynamoDB(DynamoDB)
        Lambda_Function -->|Put Object| S3(S3)
        Lambda_Function -->|Log| CloudWatch(CloudWatch)
    end
    subgraph Monitoring
        CloudWatch -->|Alarm| SNS(SNS)
        SNS -->|Notification| Developer(Developer)
    end
    subgraph Security
        API_Gateway -->|IAM Role| IAM(IAM)
        Lambda_Function -->|IAM Role| IAM
        DynamoDB -->|IAM Role| IAM
        S3 -->|IAM Role| IAM
    end
